name: Math Add
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class MathAddNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Math Add"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/plus.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("a", "number")
        self.add_input("b", "number")
        self.add_output("result", "number")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        # Get inputs, defaulting to 0
        a = inputs.get("a", 0)
        b = inputs.get("b", 0)
        
        try:
            res = float(a) + float(b)
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            res = 0.0
            
        await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
        return {"result": res}

def register_node():
    return MathAddNode
